assetPlacementGuidance.expectation: Place editable canvas-app or other app source under app-specific subfolders in `apps/`; keep generated solution bundles out of this root.
Place editable flow source under flow-specific subfolders in `flows/` so repo-local flow artifacts stay separate from solution bundles.
Keep unpacked solution source trees under `solutions/<solution>/`; treat zip files inside `solutions/` as generated or stale output, not canonical source.
Keep repo-local runbooks, provenance notes, and workflow docs under `docs/` so project context stays with the source tree.
Write generated solution zip output to `artifacts/solutions/core.zip` so packaged artifacts stay outside editable source roots.

frictions.detail: Non-canonical bundle placement: solutions/Core.zip is generated artifact output inside editable source space. Treat inline zip files as generated or stale output, not authoritative source; keep unpacked source under solutions and write packaged bundles to artifacts/solutions/core.zip.
frictions.title: Recommended bundle placement is still not canonical everywhere

frictions.detail: Operators still have to piece together stage selection, environment alias provenance, and bundle creation timing outside this command. Current route: pp.config.yaml maps stage prod to environment alias prod and solution CoreManaged. The alias resolves later through the external pp environment registry and its auth context. The canonical bundle artifacts/solutions/core.zip is not generated yet; create it with `pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip` or `pp solution export CoreManaged --environment prod --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip`.
frictions.title: Deployment route still needs one canonical explanation

frictions.detail: The local model is structurally coherent, but these required parameters still block a fully deployable project: sqlEndpoint.
frictions.title: Required inputs remain unresolved

recommendedTasks.rationale: Agents still have to infer whether inline solution bundles are merely supported or actually recommended.
recommendedTasks.title: Tighten layout validation around canonical bundle output

recommendedTasks.rationale: Operators should get one canonical explanation from selected stage to environment alias to solution target to bundle creation instead of translating between separate diagnostics.
recommendedTasks.title: Keep one deployment-route explanation across project diagnostics

summary.activeTargetSummary: stage prod -> environment prod -> solution CoreManaged
summary.bundleLifecycleSummary: The canonical bundle path is artifacts/solutions/core.zip, but that zip is a generated artifact and may be absent until you pack local source from solutions or export the solution from Dataverse. Typical creation paths are pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip or pp solution export CoreManaged --environment prod --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip.
summary.bundlePlacementSummary: Non-canonical bundle placement: solutions/Core.zip is generated artifact output inside editable source space. Treat inline zip files as generated or stale output, not authoritative source; keep unpacked source under solutions and write packaged bundles to artifacts/solutions/core.zip.
deploymentRouteSteps: pp.config.yaml maps stage prod to environment alias prod and solution CoreManaged.
The alias resolves later through the external pp environment registry and its auth context.

The canonical bundle artifacts/solutions/core.zip is not generated yet; create it with `pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip` or `pp solution export CoreManaged --environment prod --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip`.
summary.deploymentRouteSummary: pp.config.yaml maps stage prod to environment alias prod and solution CoreManaged. The alias resolves later through the external pp environment registry and its auth context. The canonical bundle artifacts/solutions/core.zip is not generated yet; create it with `pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip` or `pp solution export CoreManaged --environment prod --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip`.
summary.environmentAliasProvenance: Stage prod in pp.config.yaml selects environment alias prod. The alias name lives in the project config, but the actual Dataverse URL and auth profile are resolved later from the external pp environment registry.

workflowWins.detail: The local project model resolves through pp.config.yaml, which keeps the repo contract anchored in one place.
workflowWins.title: Single config anchor

workflowWins.detail: Editable assets stay under apps, flows, docs, while packaged solution bundles are expected at artifacts/solutions/core.zip.
workflowWins.title: Source-first asset contract

workflowWins.detail: pp.config.yaml maps stage prod to environment alias prod and solution CoreManaged. The alias resolves later through the external pp environment registry and its auth context. The canonical bundle artifacts/solutions/core.zip is not generated yet; create it with `pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip` or `pp solution export CoreManaged --environment prod --out artifacts/solutions/core.zip`.
